candidate.objective: A versatile civil and dewatering operator with solid experience across mine site pump operations, polyethylene pipeline installation, earthmoving, and concrete works. Hurae has worked for major contractors including NRW, Maali Group, and ACM Resources, with demonstrated competency in dewatering systems, poly welding, excavator and loader operation, and safe work practices in mining environments. He holds induction approvals for Rio Tinto, Mineral Resources Limited, and Fortescue.

duties: Completed civil works associated with pipeline construction, including trench preparation, pipe installation, and backfilling.
Constructed and maintained roads and access tracks to project specifications.
Performed ground clearing, topsoil removal, and topsoil storage in accordance with environmental requirements.
Completed water transfer and storage facility construction.
Installed water infrastructure including pumps and associated pipework.
Undertook tailings dam construction and civil works.
Constructed equipment pads and laydown areas.
Performed poly welding of pipe systems throughout the plant.
Installed pump systems and associated fittings.
Worked on racking levels within the plant facility.
Operated elevated work platforms (EWP) and performed spotting duties.
Fitted pumps and pipe systems to specifications.
Reported progress and issues to supervisors.
Recorded and documented all welds in accordance with quality requirements.
Maintained a safe and healthy workplace in compliance with site safety standards.
Managed and supervised business finances and operational activities.
Liaised with clients, site supervisors, and suppliers to coordinate works.
Performed formwork, steel tying, and plan reading for concrete construction.
Managed all sales, quotations, and invoicing.
Oversaw all occupational health and safety requirements and issues.
Paved driveways, sheds, paths, and crossovers.
Installed fencing and safely removed and disposed of asbestos materials.
Erected flat and gable patio structures.
Installed limestone retaining walls.
Operated bobcat, excavator, and dingo for earthworks and landscaping.
Laid artificial grass for residential and commercial clients.
Performed excavator civil works including trench excavation, poly pipe work, and sump cleaning.
Operated loaders and GPS machine control (IT) for general civil works.
Installed poly pipe systems, relocated pipes, and threw poly pipes over pit walls.
Conducted pump checks, maintenance, and documentation and monitoring of all pump systems.
Cleaned, refuelled, and relocated pumps as required.
Worked safely in open cut pit environments and collaborated across work groups.
Performed water cart truck operations for dust suppression and site services.
Installed fire hydrants as part of site services works.
Fabricated poly pipe systems for dewatering and water transfer applications.
Worked on tie-ins and fittings for pipeline systems.
Commissioned completed pipeline systems.
Built ramps and sumps for dewatering infrastructure.
Installed all pumps and associated equipment on site.
Performed maintenance on all pump systems.
Designed and applied poly pipeline systems for dewatering operations.
Threw poly pipes over pit walls and managed pipeline routing.
Removed poly pipe fittings and sump pumps in preparation for blasting operations.
Reinstated poly pipe fittings and pumps following blast events.
Performed electrical fusion welding and operated excavators ranging from 30 to 1,200 tonnes.
Operated Volvo wheel loaders and built and tidied windrows on site.
Served as an Emergency Response Team (ERT) member.
Operated excavators and bobcats for general civil and industrial works.
Performed manual work and operated gantry cranes.
Conducted pressure hosing and cleaning during turnaround and shutdown activities.
Completed general hand duties as required by site supervision.

skills.detail: Extensive experience in mine site dewatering, including pump installation, maintenance, documentation, pipeline fabrication, and sump management across iron ore and gold mining environments.
Proficient in polyethylene pipe fusion welding, electrofusion welding, pipe laying, and pipeline commissioning for civil and mining applications.
Competent operator of excavators (up to 1,200t), wheel loaders, skid steers, EWPs, water carts, and bobcats. Holds an MC Drivers Licence.
Experienced in road and access track construction, pad works, ground clearing, topsoil stripping, tailings dam works, and concrete formwork.
Sound knowledge of site safety requirements, JHA completion, asbestos handling, and environmental compliance. Inducted at Rio Tinto, MRL, and Fortescue operations.

certifications.details: Competent operator of dozers for earthworks and civil mining applications.
Competent operator of skid steer loaders.
Competent operator of wheel loaders for civil and mining materials handling.
Competent in the use of GPS grade control systems for earthworks operations.
High Risk Work Licence for C2 class crane operation.
Certified for elevated work platform operation.
Construction industry general induction (Work Safely in the Construction Industry).
Western Australian Multi-Combination (MC) class motor vehicle drivers licence.
Approved site induction for Rio Tinto operations.
Approved site induction for Mineral Resources Limited operations.
Approved site induction for Fortescue operations.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
